user.title: Set up Entity Dependency Engine
user.description: Adds a read-only dependency analysis action for Home Assistant entities.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Entity Dependency Engine instance can be configured.

generate_report.name: Generate dependency report
generate_report.description: Builds a recursive dependency graph and creates a report for one entity.

include_structural.name: Include structural relations
include_structural.description: Include devices and config entries in the readable report.

max_depth.name: Maximum depth
max_depth.description: Limits recursive traversal. Leave empty for the full graph.

language.name: Report language
language.description: Language used in the readable report. Defaults to Home Assistant's language.

save_public_copy.name: Save public copy
save_public_copy.description: Also writes reports under /config/www and returns /local URLs. Disabled by default because clients that can reach your Home Assistant server may also be able to retrieve these files.
